commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
As. Hebrew, "at the station or inn of Chama am "the son of Berzellai. (Chaldean) Perhaps our Saviour was born in this (Calmet) "inn "(Eusebius, Dem. vii. 4.) which was then deserted. (Haydock)
Egypt. These poor wretches find no repose. (Calmet)
